2605.05687.title: DataDignity: Training Data Attribution for Large Language Models
2605.05687.paper_summary: Auditing language-model outputs often requires more than judging correctness: an auditor may need to identify which source document most likely supports the knowledge expressed in a response. We study this as pinpoint provenance: given a prompt, a target-model response, and a candidate corpus, rank the documents that best support the response. We introduce FakeWiki, a controlled benchmark of 3,537 fabricated Wikipedia-style articles designed to preserve ground-truth provenance while weakening lexical shortcuts. FakeWiki includes QA probes, source-preserving paraphrases, retro-generated variants, hard anti-documents that remain topically similar while removing answer-critical facts, and five query conditions: clean prompting plus four jailbreak-inspired transformations. We evaluate seven retrieval baselines, a training-free activation-steering retrieval-fusion method, SteerFuse, and a supervised contrastive provenance ranker, ScoringModel. ScoringModel maps response and document features into a shared space and is trained with InfoNCE using in-batch, retrieval-mined, and anti-document negatives. Across nine open-weight instruction-tuned LLMs and five query conditions, ScoringModel improves mean Recall@10 from 35.0 for the strongest retrieval baseline to 52.2, without inference-time fusion, and wins 41/45 model-by-condition cells. SteerFuse is usually second-best despite requiring no supervised training, showing that activation-space evidence can efficiently complement text retrieval. On jailbreak-inspired transformed queries, ScoringModel improves Recall@10 by 15.7 points on average over the best baseline. Overall, our work shows that robust training data attribution requires evaluation settings that separate true answer support from topical or lexical resemblance.
2605.05687.paper_summary_zh: 審計語言模型的輸出通常需要的不僅僅是判斷正確性：審計員可能需要識別哪個來源文件最有可能支持回應中表達的知識。我們將此研究稱為精確來源：給定一個提示、一個目標模型的回應和一個候選語料庫，對最能支持該回應的文件進行排名。我們引入了FakeWiki，一個包含3,537篇虛構維基百科風格文章的受控基準，旨在保留真實來源的同時削弱詞彙捷徑。FakeWiki包括問答探針、保留來源的改寫、逆向生成的變體、在主題上保持相似但移除關鍵事實的困難反文件，以及五種查詢條件：乾淨提示加上四種靈感來自越獄的轉換。我們評估了七個檢索基線、一種無需訓練的激活引導檢索融合方法SteerFuse，以及一個監督對比來源排名器ScoringModel。ScoringModel將回應和文件特徵映射到共享空間，並使用InfoNCE進行訓練，使用批內、檢索挖掘和反文件的負樣本。在九個開放權重指令調整的LLM和五種查詢條件下，ScoringModel將平均Recall@10從最強檢索基線的35.0提高到52.2，且無需推理時融合，並在41/45的模型與條件單元中獲勝。儘管SteerFuse不需要監督訓練，但通常是第二好的，顯示出激活空間證據可以有效補充文本檢索。在靈感來自越獄的轉換查詢中，ScoringModel的Recall@10平均提高了15.7個點，超過最佳基線。總體而言，我們的工作表明，穩健的訓練數據歸屬需要評估設置，將真實答案支持與主題或詞彙相似性分開。
2605.05687.author: Xiaomin Li et.al.
2605.05687.authors: Xiaomin Li, Andrzej Banburski-Fahey, Jaron Lanier
